languages.text: All enemies hit by the {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}Electrical{/g} creature are affected by this effect once more when this creature's turn ends.

traits.locale_text: All enemies hit by the {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}Electrical{/g} creature are affected by this effect once more when this creature's turn ends.

languages.text: When a creature affected by {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}electrified strikes{/g} ends its turn, each creature damaged by this effect triggers it again.
languages.original_text: All enemies hit by the {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}Electrical{/g} creature are affected by this effect once more when this creature's turn ends.

traits.locale_text: When a creature affected by {g|f:68f3934e6b5345808b49eaea6ce758a1}static field{/g} dies, it deals {uip|ShockDamage|68f3934e6b5345808b49eaea6ce758a1} shock damage to other enemies within a 2-cell radius around it. After that, half of the stacks of this effect on the died creature are inflicted on each target affected.
When a creature affected by {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}electrified strikes{/g} ends its turn, each creature damaged by this effect triggers it again.

When a creature affected by {g|f:68f3934e6b5345808b49eaea6ce758a1}static field{/g} dies, it deals {uip|ShockDamage|68f3934e6b5345808b49eaea6ce758a1} shock damage to other enemies within a 2-cell radius around it. After, half of the stacks that were on the dead creature are inflicted on each target affected.

languages.text: Когда существо под эффектом {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}заряженные атаки{/g} заканчивает ход, этот эффект срабатывает на каждом существе, получившем урон от этого эффекта.
languages.original_text: When a creature affected by {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}electrified strikes{/g} ends its turn, each creature damaged by this effect triggers it again.

languages.text: Cuando una criatura afectada por {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}golpes electrizados{/g} termina su turno, todas las criaturas dañadas por el efecto lo activan otra vez.

languages.text: Beendet eine Kreatur unter dem Einfluss von {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}Elektrisierte Schläge{/g} ihren Zug, aktivieren alle durch diesen Effekt verletzten Kreaturen den Effekt erneut.

languages.text: {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}Elektrikli ataklar{/g} etkisindeki bir yaratık, turunu sonlandırdığında bu etkinin hasar verdiği her yaratık etkiyi yeniden tetikler.

languages.text: 受到{g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}带电打击{/g}影响的生物结束其回合时，所有被该效果伤害过的生物都会再次触发此效果。

languages.text: {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}帯電打撃{/g}の影響を受けているクリーチャーがターンを終了したとき、この効果によってダメージを受けた各クリーチャーが再びそれを発動する。
